testcase.name: testGrade_WhenAllScoresProvided_ShouldCalculateFinalScoreCorrectly
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username='student_1' fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into subjects (category, code, credits, description, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into grades (attendanceScore, finalExamScore, finalScore, gradeText, midtermScore, student_id, subject_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select g1_0.id, g1_0.attendanceScore, g1_0.finalExamScore, g1_0.finalScore, g1_0.gradeText, g1_0.midtermScore, g1_0.student_id, g1_0.subject_id from grades g1_0 where g1_0.student_id=? and g1_0.subject_id=? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.category, s1_0.code, s1_0.credits, s1_0.description, s1_0.name from subjects s1_0 where s1_0.id=? Hibernate: update grades set attendanceScore=?, finalExamScore=?, finalScore=?, gradeText=?, midtermScore=?, student_id=?, subject_id=? where id=? Hibernate: select g1_0.id, g1_0.attendanceScore, g1_0.finalExamScore, g1_0.finalScore, g1_0.gradeText, g1_0.midtermScore, g1_0.student_id, g1_0.subject_id from grades g1_0 where g1_0.student_id=? and g1_0.subject_id=?

testcase.name: testTuition_FullPayment_ShouldChangeToPaid
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username='student_1' fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into subjects (category, code, credits, description, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into grades (attendanceScore, finalExamScore, finalScore, gradeText, midtermScore, student_id, subject_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into tuition_fees (paidAmount, semesterId, status, studentId, totalAmount, totalCredits, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into payment_transactions (amount, method, paymentDate, tuitionFeeId, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: update tuition_fees set paidAmount=?, semesterId=?, status=?, studentId=?, totalAmount=?, totalCredits=? where id=?

testcase.name: testEnrollment_CancelApprovedClass_ShouldBePrevented
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username='student_1' fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into subjects (category, code, credits, description, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into grades (attendanceScore, finalExamScore, finalScore, gradeText, midtermScore, student_id, subject_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into enrollments (classroomId, status, studentId, id) values (?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: delete from enrollments where studentId=? and classroomId=? and status='PENDING'

testcase.name: testTuition_NegativePaymentAmount_ShouldNotProcess
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username='student_1' fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into subjects (category, code, credits, description, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into grades (attendanceScore, finalExamScore, finalScore, gradeText, midtermScore, student_id, subject_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into tuition_fees (paidAmount, semesterId, status, studentId, totalAmount, totalCredits, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: testTuition_PartialPayment_ShouldRemainUnpaid
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username='student_1' fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into subjects (category, code, credits, description, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into grades (attendanceScore, finalExamScore, finalScore, gradeText, midtermScore, student_id, subject_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into tuition_fees (paidAmount, semesterId, status, studentId, totalAmount, totalCredits, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into payment_transactions (amount, method, paymentDate, tuitionFeeId, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: update tuition_fees set paidAmount=?, semesterId=?, status=?, studentId=?, totalAmount=?, totalCredits=? where id=?

testcase.name: testGrade_WhenMissingFinalExamScore_ShouldNotCalculateFinalScore
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: select s1_0.id, s1_0.avatar, s1_0.email, s1_0.firstName, s1_0.lastName, s1_0.password, s1_0.role, s1_0.username from users s1_0 where s1_0.username='student_1' fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: insert into subjects (category, code, credits, description, name, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into grades (attendanceScore, finalExamScore, finalScore, gradeText, midtermScore, student_id, subject_id, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: select g1_0.id, g1_0.attendanceScore, g1_0.finalExamScore, g1_0.finalScore, g1_0.gradeText, g1_0.midtermScore, g1_0.student_id, g1_0.subject_id from grades g1_0 where g1_0.student_id=? and g1_0.subject_id=?
